content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.cognition.trading_cognition
FILE: cosmos/core/cognition/trading_cognition.py (128 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Trading Cognition - Reasoning & Learning.

"I don't just trade; I observe the fractal nature of the degen mind."

This module provides high-level logic for:
1. Signal Reasoning (Multi-factor evaluation)
2. Trade Learning (Feedback loops based on price action)
3. Exception-aware Execution

CLASSES:
- TradingCognition
  Methods: async def evaluate_token(self, token_data: dict) -> dict
  Methods: async def record_outcome(self, mint: str, price_after_4h: float)
- TradeExceptionManager: Handles fallbacks and explanations for failed trades.
  Methods: async def handle_execution(coro)
